positive: A detailed, symmetrical, central composition of bioluminescent cosmic flora and celestial elements. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration. The scene features stylized, intertwining lunar leaves and glowing starry vines set against a deep indigo and obsidian background. The artwork must utilize strong, clean black silhouettes contrasted by glowing highlights in cyan, electric blue, and subtle gold foil accents. Focus on intricate linework, perfect symmetry, and a strong sense of mystical depth. The design should be flat-graphic, high-contrast, and perfectly suited for a repeating apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, amateur, grayscale, low detail, realistic photography, copyright, logos
